headline: A compact command center for the Royals season

latest_prospect_update.name: Blake Mitchell
latest_prospect_update.note: Most obvious remaining minor-league prospect to track; catcher development and power/patience are the main signals. Recent line: .167 / .333 / .250.

nightly_recap: The Royals lost to the New York Yankees, KC 3, NYY 4. Michael Wacha led the night, working 7.0 innings with 2 earned runs, 5 strikeouts and 2 walks. Bobby Witt Jr. supplied the loudest Royals contact at 112.2 mph.

player_of_game.name: Michael Wacha
player_of_game.reason: worked 7.0 innings with 2 earned runs, 5 strikeouts and 2 walks.
